title: Water Imbued Enchantment
description: This mod adds two new enchantments that allow the use of riptide and channeling without the need of water, rain or thunderstorm.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc4175dd5560839b1681dbbdabe0a94c8f5c45f_0.webp)
## About the mod
Have you ever wished to be able to use Riptide and Channeling enchantments more often, then this mod is for you. The idea came out because rain rarely happens in minecraft, and thundering is even more rare.

## What does the mod add? The mod adds two new enchantments to the game: Water Imbued, and Thunder Imbued, which respectively allow you to use riptide and channeling whenever you want.

## How to obtain the enchanted books To encourage players to explore the world, and make it a little harder to obtain the enchantments, by default they can only be obtained by killing Elder Guardians in water monuments. When killed, a Water Imbued Enchanted book has a 50% chance to be dropped, and a Thunder Imbued Enchanted book has a 35% chance to be dropped (that means if you are lucky enough you could obtain both enchantments by killing a single Elder Guardian).

## Configuration The mod is quite configurable though, so you can go to the config file in the config folder inside the .minecraft folder, or you can install [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to do it graphically.

## Requirements [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required.


**Note**: If you are looking for the earliest versions of the mod check the first project page [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/water-imbued-enchantment).
